commits.summary: Open slice G6 — LIVE_SAFE_STRATEGIES typed frozenset + boot assert
Slice G6 RED — LIVE_SAFE_STRATEGIES antibody (8 tests, all failing)
Slice G6 GREEN — wire LIVE_SAFE_STRATEGIES into live boot

regression_panel.method: stash-test confirmed identical baseline pre/post GREEN

operator_visible_breaking_change.applies_when: ZEUS_MODE=live AND any of {settlement_capture, shoulder_sell, center_buy} is enabled (default state)
operator_visible_breaking_change.behavior: Daemon refuses to launch with FATAL exit message naming offending strategies
operator_visible_breaking_change.remediation: Operator must explicitly disable each non-allowlisted strategy via control_plane set_strategy_gate before relaunching live daemon
operator_visible_breaking_change.rationale: Workbook G6 acceptance — 'Live boot raises if any non-allowlisted strategy reaches discovery'. Today only opening_inertia is operator-approved for live execution.

followups_owed.summary: LIVE_SAFE_CITIES typed frozenset + executor.py pre-CLOB assertion (same pattern as G6)
followups_owed.gating: Wait for zeus-pr18-fix-plan-20260426 to merge (executor.py overlap)

lore_extraction_recommendation: Pattern reusable for G7. If a third typed-allowlist arrives, extract a shared 'live-allowlist boot guard' helper to architecture/. Until then, copy-paste cost < abstraction cost.
